Name: insert_user_departments_one
SQL: WITH check_nested_department AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $1::uuid AS "id", $2::text AS "name", $3::text AS "description", $4::numeric AS "budget") AS data WHERE true), nested_department AS (INSERT INTO "public"."departments" ("id", "name", "description", "budget") SELECT check_nested_department."id", check_nested_department."name", check_nested_department."description", check_nested_department."budget" FROM check_nested_department RETURNING *), check_nested_employees AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $5::uuid AS "user_id", $6::text AS "role", nested_department."id" AS "department_id" FROM nested_department) AS data WHERE true), nested_employees AS (INSERT INTO "public"."user_departments" ("user_id", "role", "department_id") SELECT check_nested_employees."user_id", check_nested_employees."role", nested_department."id" FROM check_nested_employees, nested_department RETURNING *), check_mutation_result AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $7::uuid AS "user_id", $8::text AS "role", nested_department."id" AS "department_id" FROM nested_department) AS data WHERE true), mutation_result AS (INSERT INTO "public"."user_departments" ("user_id", "role", "department_id") SELECT check_mutation_result."user_id", check_mutation_result."role", nested_department."id" FROM check_mutation_result, nested_department RETURNING *) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT mutation_result."user_id" AS "user_id", mutation_result."department_id" AS "department_id", "mutation_result.r.user"."user" AS "user", (SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "id" AS "id", "name" AS "name", "description" AS "description", "budget" AS "budget") AS "_e")) FROM nested_department LIMIT 1) AS "department") AS "_e")) FROM mutation_result LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (WITH "mutation_result.r.user.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "auth"."users" WHERE "mutation_result"."user_id" = "id" LIMIT 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "mutation_result.r.user.base"."display_name" AS "displayName") AS "_e")) AS "user" FROM "mutation_result.r.user.base") AS "mutation_result.r.user" ON ('true') WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_department) IS NOT NULL AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_employees) IS NOT NULL
